---
title: "Explore Data"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

<div id="shiny-container"></div>

```{=html}
<script>

function renderIframeFromURL() {

  const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
  const species = params.get("species");

  let shinyURL = "https://jbaljunas.shinyapps.io/species_data/";

  if (species) {
    shinyURL += "?species=" + encodeURIComponent(species);
  }

  document.getElementById("shiny-container").innerHTML = `
    <iframe
      src="${shinyURL}"
      width="100%"
      height="900px"
      style="border:none;">
    </iframe>
  `;
}

// initial load
renderIframeFromURL();

// whenever URL changes (important)
window.addEventListener("popstate", renderIframeFromURL);

</script>
```
